Minor Metals Monthly No.155 Website: www.antaike.com 2 Antimony Market Overview for 2012 Price Review 2012 The antimony market in January 2013 appears calm with few transactions and steady price. The domestic quotations of antimony ingot (2#) and antimony oxide (99.5%) were mainly maintained at 67,000-68,000yuan/t and 60,000-62,000yuan/t, seeing small scale of decrease compared with that in 2012. After New Year Holidays, inquires in antimony ingot market started to increase. However, transactions didn’t see large improvement. Currently, traders asking for quotation aim at confirm the current price of antimony ingot rather than having purchase intention. Before the end of 2012, most of suppliers reduced price to de-stock the current stock. Spring Festival is coming. Although the demand is weak, suppliers would not like to cut price to sell products when having no large stock and capital pressure. The price of antimony ingot (2#) is strong and the price of antimony oxide is maintained at 61,000-62,000yuan/t (ex-work price). At present, most of customers still replenish stock in accordance with demand.

f antimony oxide is maintained at 61,000-62,000yuan/t (ex-work price). At present, most of customers still replenish stock in accordance with demand. In the past one month, the watching attitude kept thick in the antimony oxide market. Therefore, transactions in spot goods market were few. At the end of January, many suppliers suspended quotation to prepare for Spring Festival, and transactions of antimony ingot and antimony oxide in spot goods market were not active. In accordance with quotation collected by Antaike, the quotation of antimony ingot (2#) was maintained at 67,000-68,000yuan/t in January. Therefore, the average quotation of it was 67,000-68,000yuan/t in Jan., dwon by 1.5% m-o-m and 5.2% y-o-y.
